column1: # Chrome Shaper — Tesshari card roster additions
# Class fantasy: reshapes flesh as armor or blade in real time; living biomods; the body as medium.
# Primary stats: FRAME + IRON. Paths: War Shaper, Edge Builder, Resonance Sculptor.
# === L1 CORE (fill gaps: reaction, passive, mobility/utility flavor) ===

column3: A hand sprouts cartilage plates just in time to catch a blow. React to an incoming melee hit; reduce its damage.
When struck, a spine of bone erupts from the wound and gores the attacker. React to a melee hit to deal damage back.
Your body perpetually rewrites itself. While any configuration is active, you regenerate minor wounds each round.
Peel a layer of dead chrome-flesh and harden what remains. Shed a condition or debuff; suffer a minor wound in exchange.
Your chassis learns to hold two shapes at once. Maintain two Configurations simultaneously instead of one.
Muscle memory overtakes bone memory. Reconfigure as a reaction once per combat instead of an action.

column1: # === L3 SUBCLASS — WAR SHAPER (living armor that adapts mid-combat) ===

column3: The plates on your skin shift with each incoming blow, matching the strike type. Gain resistance to the last damage type that hit you.
Abdominal muscle thickens into a wall of meat. Gain temporary hit points; allies adjacent to you share a fraction.
Your skin reads the battlefield before your mind does. Once per round, the first attack against you this round misses outright.
Flesh closes over the gash before blood can leave it. When you would drop below half health, stabilize and shed a wound condition.

column1: # === L3 SUBCLASS — EDGE BUILDER (grows blade-extensions from flesh) ===

column3: A femur splits and extrudes from your forearm, dripping marrow. Grow a melee weapon from your body for the encounter.
A tendon whips free of its sheath, tipped with fang-shards. Make a melee attack with extended reach; on hit, pull the target one step.
Cartilage shards tear loose of your skin in a cone. Damage all enemies in a short cone in front of you; you take a minor wound.
Fingers fuse into a barbed claw meant for catching meat. Next attack this turn pierces armor and leaves a bleeding barb that deals damage next round.

column1: # === L3 SUBCLASS — RESONANCE SCULPTOR (carves resonant symbols into meat) ===

column3: You drag a bloody glyph down your forearm; the target's chrome answers it. One enemy cannot Configure or activate augments next round.
Carve a twin rune — one on you, one on an ally. You split incoming damage between you until either of you falls.
A low resonant note emanates from the sigils in your skin. Allies within short range gain a small bonus to their next FRAME or IRON check.
A contradictory glyph, cut deliberately wrong. The marked enemy takes extra damage from the next attack made against them.
Bone and plate fuse across your torso into an impenetrable shell. For several rounds, halve all damage you take; you cannot move more than one step per turn.
Every wound you have taken this fight pushes to the surface, hardening. Gain temporary hit points equal to damage already sustained this combat.
Dozens of bone-blades erupt from your back, your arms, your jaw. All melee attacks this round hit every adjacent enemy; you take a minor wound at end of round.
Cast off a limb that has fully bladed over and hurl it. Ranged attack that ignores cover and regrows the limb next round.
Every glyph you have cut this fight sings at once. All sigils you have placed on allies and enemies trigger their effect a second time.
You carve a shape no body should hold. One target's augmentations, implants, and glyphs go silent for the rest of combat.
